summary: Testing of 6 new professional KPI cards in Prayer Areas Map stats panel. All 6 KPIs verified working with correct values, labels, units, and dynamic colors. KPI cards display: إجمالي المواقع (60), إجمالي الفئات (9/15), المساحة الإجمالية (200 م²), متوسط المصلين (1 مصلي), نسبة الإشغال (0%), مناطق حرجة (0). Dynamic color coding working - occupancy and critical zones show green when safe.

tab_switching.map_tab: PASS - الخريطة tab clickable and works
tab_switching.density_tab: PASS - الكثافات tab clickable and works
tab_switching.employees_tab: PASS - الموظفين tab clickable and works

critical_code_review_comments: MapStatsPanel.jsx Lines 91-120: 6 KPI cards implemented with proper data-testid attributes (live-kpi-0 through live-kpi-5)
KPI colors correctly applied: green for zones/safe metrics, blue for categories, purple for area, light blue for worshippers
Dynamic color thresholds working: occupancy >80%=red, >50%=amber, else green; critical zones >0=red, else green
DailySessionsPage.jsx Lines 509-516: sessionStats correctly calculates totalArea and avgWorshippers
DailySessionsPage.jsx Lines 728-735: densityStats passed to MapStatsPanel with criticalCount and overallPct
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 40 tested new 6 KPI cards in Prayer Areas Map stats panel. Navigation: /daily-sessions -> click session circle -> view stats panel on right side (40% width). Key data-testids: live-kpi-grid (container), live-kpi-0 through live-kpi-5 (individual cards), live-donut (chart). KPIs use dynamic colors for occupancy (>80%=red, >50%=amber, else green) and critical zones (>0=red, else green). All features working correctly.
